reviews.comment:
Servicio??no te lavan los vidrios, baños sin jabón, ni alcohol, ni para secar las manos
Mucha demora para cargar combustible, ni te ofrecen control de aceite o agua
No recomiendo, si van ...lleven termo y mate

(Translated by Google)
Service? They don't wash your windows, the bathrooms have no soap, no hand sanitizer, and nothing to dry your hands. There are huge delays at the gas station, and they don't offer oil or water checks. I don't recommend it. If you go... bring a thermos and mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtbzVtbjZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estoy muy agradecida a pesar q mi hijo falleció el 6 de octubre bajamos al baño y mi hijo de 16 años se descompenso hizo un paro falleció
Todos corrieron en este lugar brindándonos ayuda
Seguimos pasando por ay porq tenemos casa en santa clara pero no eh podido parar de la angustia q me genera
Gracias

(Translated by Google)
I am so grateful, even though my son passed away on October 6th. We went down to the bathroom and my 16-year-old son collapsed, had a cardiac arrest, and died. Everyone there rushed to our aid. We keep passing by because we have a house in Santa Clara, but I haven't been able to stop because of the anguish it causes me. Thank you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtemFIWGp3RRAB
